q: The Ragic tool is incredible. In 4 weeks, we have completely transformed the operations of a $11MM business. We have put so much of our processes and data into Ragic!

My manager mentioned how fortunate we are to have Ragic system as our Project Management Database. He said he would hate to think where we would be today without it. It has certainly been a tremendous help to our department!

Let me say that I am blown away by your product! I can do things I never dreamed of being able to do and every hour I am learning about new and more powerful features. It seems that every time I think there is a roadblock, I find a solution that works even better than I thought.

I would like to say that I LOVE Ragic, I've easily built my own custom CRM which I'm using now competely personalized for me. Could not get this from an "off the shelf" CRM regardless of how "customizable" they claim to be.
I absolutely love your software. I tested several database apps and yours is the best and most intuitive.
The entire program impresses me a lot - I think it is AMAZING. Ragic is helping my small business immensely. Ragic is a game changer. So, thank you all very much.
This product is absolutely awesome. I can't tell you how long I looked for a product like this.

May I say I absolutely love this software. I've been battling with Microsoft access for months now trying to create a database for my business each time ending in epic failure. Ragic is brilliant. I have been able to do what I needed to.
Ragic is absolutely brilliant! Coming from a SQL Server and MS Access background this is a breath of fresh air :-)
By the way, the more I use Ragic, the more impressed I get with its functionality and user experience (my requests have been pickiness at this point). You guys have a very nice product on your hands.
I love Ragic. It's relational capabilities are truly the best I've seen. I've worked with them all.

Hello Ragic, I just wanted to give you kudos for building such an awesome database.  This program is so much better than the previous database I was using.  I love the customizable (is that a word?) features and the ability I have to change the database to meet my needs.  I really enjoy using it.  It is helping me to excel in my business. Thanks again for a job well done
You guys rock - thanks so much for the fantastic support.
I am impressed however with the ease at which it takes to use your system and the setting up of webpages, you have done a fantastic job in this part of the design.... congratulations.
Wow..Fantastic service as well - thanks.  It looks like I can build the CRM I've never been able to have.
I have tested all the online database builders I can find online, and Ragic is by far the most advanced.
Thank you so much!! I love using Ragic. It’s easy and I can design my databases however I want and edit them to fit my needs. Thank you so much for creating such a wonderful product!

I am very thankful for you and your team and the excellent work you do maintaining and improving our online database! Your company is more than a company. It is a group of people working together and responding to the needs of your customers. The difference between a “company” and a “group of people” is clearly evident in the way you do business and the way you communicate with your customers!   Thank you for what you do and how you do it!
Again, a great and powerful platform.  I only wish I had found it sooner.
Thanks for the creation of Ragic for the amazing platform that it is. It really does meet our every desire, and offers us an extremely affordable and scalable solution to grow our business offering.
The app however is working wonderfully and amazing to have access to all the data so easily. Well done!
Hi your database is amazing, that’s exactly what I was looking for. I haven’t realized I liked it so much. It was really great.
Overall Ragic is an AMAZING product. Thank you!
The search bar at the top is amazing!
You do have an amazing tool. It's very useful for businesses and larger organizations, and I will be happy to mention it to my friends when applicable.
Ragic is amazing platform for us.
It really does seem like an amazing product/solution.
Ragic has been an excellent program to replace our MyDatabase file.
Excellent customer service, and I really love magic.
Hi Sophia I'm absolutely loving RAGIC
We absolutely LOVE your product, for it has helped us in the enormous task of loading a viewable database (in a pleasant format) into our website.
I find Ragic really incredible.
I love Ragic since it's easy to use and pretty powerful
we love ragic, so far the free version is enough for our needs.
You have a wonderful product that I will be selling my organization on using very soon.
I am grateful to the folks at Ragic for making it available and I'm perfectly happy with the way I'm using it.
your dedication to customer service is very impressive
Thanks once again for such an excellent product "Ragic"

support has been excellent and very responsive. I cannot thank you enough for your help.

I think Ragic is a superb tool and I absolutely have a need for it.
